timeline.event: Tandem Perovskite Solar Cells Surpass 34% Efficiency
timeline.description: Hybrid solar cells combining silicon and perovskite achieved a record efficiency of over 34%, boosting small-scale renewable energy capabilities.

timeline.event: ASML Announces EUV Chipmaking Speed Breakthrough
timeline.description: Semiconductor equipment leader ASML unveiled a new 1,000-watt light source designed to increase EUV chipmaking speed by 50% by 2030.

timeline.event: Metal-Ion Batteries Reach Commercialization for Energy Storage
timeline.description: Safer alternative battery technologies, such as sodium-ion and iron-air, are entering the commercial market for large-scale renewable energy storage.

timeline.event: Base Molecular Resonance Unveils Quantum Detection Advance
timeline.description: BMRT announced a significant leap in its quantum resonance detection platform, vastly improving precision targeting control and signal-to-noise ratio.
